data.reasoning: Both models skipped the critical PKGBUILD file due to incorrect binary classification, preventing any safety analysis of build/install logic.
coverage_issues: PKGBUILD skipped by both models despite being essential for AUR safety checks
No files reviewed at all – critical build/install hooks completely unexamined
false_negatives: All potential risks in PKGBUILD (malicious commands, unsafe variables, dangerous functions) were missed
Possible .install scripts or source code handling not evaluated
learnings: Fix file type detection: PKGBUILD must never be misclassified as binary
Prioritize critical files: Abort audit if PKGBUILD isn't reviewed
Add fallback checks: If PKGBUILD appears binary, flag for manual review
Improve error handling: Skip verdicts require clearer justification
